title: Scissor Trail Safari
description: Guide finger-scissors along straight, curved, and spiral paper trails to free safari animals.
learningGoals: Control movement along straight and gently angled cutting lines
Practice smooth continuous strokes on curves and spirals
Strengthen hand-eye steering for real-world scissor practice
interactionModel: trace each dotted cutting trail continuously with one finger
feedbackModel: The cutting trail sparkles as the child advances; wandering gets a gentle spoken reminder, and every completed path frees an animal with named praise.
credits: QLOBE Kids contributors; placeholder emoji art (see ASSETS.md).
